description: 10 of 15 PSM workflows (contractor-management, mi-inspection, moc-process, pha-hazop, psi-management, pssr-review, sop-management, employee-participation, hot-work-permit, psm-worker-training) cited only a single bare 'OSHA-KR Article 44' — technically exempt from the array/count rule at the time (skip_workflow_validation: true) but substantively thinner than sibling PSM workflows citing 3-4 well-matched sources.
